name: Claim denied by bar after AI sanction, what next?
description: Appeal bar decision, pursue civil suit.[1]

mainEntity.name: Claim denied by bar after AI sanction, what next?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal bar decision, pursue civil suit.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Appeal internally, then judicial review; sue for malpractice separately. Post-Levidow bars investigate rigorously.[1] Key factors: new evidence, procedure. Hire review counsel. Persistence key.
